findings.description: The image contains a separate first program box labeled 'プログラム例 関数の定義（引数あり）' showing only the function definition (○hello(文字列型: name) / nameを出力する / "こんにちは"を出力する) without the call line. This definition-only box has no dedicated figure entity; its content is partially embedded in term::3's definition text and figure::4's caption, but the distinct 'definition box vs call box' split is not surfaced as two separate figure entities. Low severity because the code content is not lost.

reviewer_notes: Six entities cover all major content: term for 引数, section header, syntax format, inline explanation, combined call program example, and output. The only gap is the definition-only program box (before the section break) not having its own figure entity — it is folded into the surrounding term and call-example figure. Translations are accurate; output 'Yamada-san Konnichiwa' is a reasonable en rendering of '山田さんこんにちは'.
